---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  page-size: 10
---

Occasional writing on research, teaching, and the tools I use. Expect accessible explanations of econometric methods, R and Python tutorials, reflections on teaching with AI, and notes from conferences.
